title: Make plan mutations atomic and durable
description: Persist draft creation, activation lifecycle changes, and idempotency outcomes as indivisible recoverable mutations.
target: For 100% of injected failure and interruption points, restart inspection observes either the complete mutation exactly once or the unchanged pre-operation state; zero partial revisions, duplicate drafts, missing outcomes, or multiply active periods occur.
load_condition: Failures before and after validation, idempotency reservation, revision durability, prior-revision supersession, activation durability, and result delivery.
measurement: Failure-injection and restart tests inspect durable plan, revision, lifecycle, and idempotency state after every cut point.
rationale: Local process interruption must not make owner intent ambiguous.
